steps.title: Factor out the common power
steps.content:
Start by factoring the original expression so it has the same outside factor of $y^4$:
$$
52y^5-28y^4=y^4(52y-28)
$$

steps.title: Match the target factor
steps.content: The expression inside the parentheses has a common factor of $4$: $$ y^4(52y-28)=4y^4(13y-7) $$ In the form $ry^4(13y-7)$, the value of $r$ is the outside constant. The answer is 4.
